name: logly
description: Query your Logly web analytics — traffic, funnels and real-time visitors — from Claude.

api_key.title: Logly API key
api_key.description: Create one in Settings → API keys in your Logly dashboard at app.logly.uk.

tools.name: logly_list_sites
tools.description: List every site in the account with its ID.

tools.name: logly_stats
tools.description: Pageviews, sessions, visitors, bounce rate, daily series, previous-period comparison.

tools.name: logly_breakdown
tools.description: Top pages, referrers, countries and devices.

tools.name: logly_funnels
tools.description: A site's conversion funnels and their steps.

tools.name: logly_funnel_results
tools.description: Completion and drop-off per funnel step.

tools.name: logly_install_snippet
tools.description: The tracking tag to add Logly to a site.
